ip_outcome_note: Card name, art, and species confirmed as Victini via PokemonTCG.io API (swsh8-36). Internal Pokemon IP — no external crossover risk.

trivia_bullets.text: Victini is National Pokedex no. 494, placing it after Arceus (493). In the Unova regional Pokedex it holds number 000 — the only non-glitch Pokemon ever assigned that designation. A deliberate design choice making Victini the mythical zero that precedes all Unova starters.

Victini's species classification is Victory Pokemon, and its signature move V-create is the highest base-power Fire-type move in the game (base power 180). Under normal gameplay Victini cannot learn V-create by leveling up; it was originally distributed only via event download tied to the 2011 films.
sources: Wikipedia Pokemon Movie Black/White via WebSearch snippet

trivia_bullets.text: Victini starred in a pair of simultaneously released theatrical films: Pokemon the Movie: White — Victini and Zekrom and Pokemon the Movie: Black — Victini and Reshiram (July 16, 2011, directed by Kunihiko Yuyama). The Japanese theatrical run grossed over $57 million combined. A promotional Victini distributed for the films carried V-create, Searing Shot, Fusion Flare, and Fusion Bolt — moves otherwise unobtainable on the species.
sources: Wikipedia Pokemon Movie Black/White via WebSearch snippet

trivia_bullets.text: "When it shares the infinite energy it creates, that being's entire body will be overflowing with power."
